content: We can reframe general-purpose computer automation agents as lifelong curiosity-driven reinforcement learning agents, where intrinsic curiosity rewards from methods like ICM and RND replace rigid task-specific reward signals to drive the agent to discover and automate unrequested, high-value repetitive user workflows. This replaces the common status-quo where automation agents only complete pre-specified tasks they are explicitly assigned.
source_topics: 计算机自动化代理程序
curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
